title: BEM-835 execute 834 repair

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 05:54 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem834_read_833_execute_next_proof.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
status_in=prev.get('status')
created_files=[]
if status_in=='dispatch_results_missing' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem835_self_dispatch_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v7','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-835 self dispatch probe for result writer','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='self_dispatch_probe_created'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif status_in=='runtime_state_missing' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    # Ensure Claude dispatcher queue exists, then mark next check.
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem835_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v7','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-835 runtime-state probe for Claude dispatcher','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_created'
    next_action='fresh tick, parse dispatch result, then verify runtime state'
elif status_in=='real_response_missing' or 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='real_response_repair_selected'
    next_action='patch Claude prompt/provider response writer and retry'
else:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-835','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem835_execute_bem834_repair.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem835_execute_bem834_repair.md').write_text('# BEM-835 | Execute BEM-834 Repair | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem835_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-835'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem835_execute_bem834_repair.json','governance/reports/bem835_execute_bem834_repair.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem835_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed the next proof repair selected by BEM-834: dispatch result probe, Claude runtime probe, or real response repair')
"""
